brandLine: TECHNOFLUID LUBRICANTS, a Brand of Lube Chem Industries, India
about: Our company Lube Chem Industries is a spirited ISO 9001:2015 certified Company, deals in massive range of products which feeds wide sum of small and large industries all over India, dealing in lubricants SINCE 1971. We formulate & manufacture vast range of Industrial Oils, Automotive Lubricants, Greases and other Specialty Oils that is Transformer Oils and Rubber Process Oils by the brand name TECHNOFLUID as per the international quality standards. Characteristics like remarkable lubrication ability, high flashpoint, low volatility, and low pour point possess our lubricants. We formulate products for every application.

whyChooseUs.intro: With deep industry knowledge, advanced manufacturing capabilities, and a commitment to quality, TECHNOFLUID LUBRICANTS has built a strong reputation for:
whyChooseUs.closing: We take pride in offering tailor-made lubrication solutions to meet every industrial and automotive need.

ourCommitment: At TECHNOFLUID, we believe in continuous innovation and technological advancement, ensuring that our products not only meet but exceed industry expectations.

journey.heading: Our Journey
journey.intro: Technofluid is the culmination of over five decades of experience, dedication, and continuous growth in the lubricants industry.

milestones.title: The beginning
milestones.text: Mr. Ramesh Chander Verma entered the lubricants business with a commitment to delivering reliable products and building lasting customer relationships, establishing a solid presence in the market.

milestones.title: The second generation
milestones.text: Mr. Gaurav Verma became actively involved in operations, bringing fresh energy and a progressive vision — expanding the product range, strengthening customer outreach, and enhancing technical capabilities.

milestones.title: The TECHNOFLUID brand
milestones.text: The TECHNOFLUID brand was launched with a mission to provide high-quality automotive and industrial lubricants tailored to the evolving needs of modern industries and vehicles.

milestones.title: A new chapter
milestones.text: Alongside Mr. Gaurav Verma, Mr. Rajiv Kumar and Mr. Hemant Sethi have joined the management team — strengthening Technofluid's presence across India while expanding its reach into international markets.

journey.closing: Built on a strong foundation laid in 1971 and strengthened through generations of dedication and expertise, Technofluid continues its journey with renewed energy and ambition — committed to delivering world-class lubrication solutions and a lasting global presence.

_sourceNote: Copy verbatim from Gaurav Verma WhatsApp, 31 Mar 2026. Tagline confirmed separately by Ansh. JAS-ANZ certification mention dropped 2026-07-08 per Ansh — certification pending change; parent company name corrected to 'Lube Chem Industries' (no period). 'journey' section from Gaurav's 'journey technofluid.docx' (16 Jul 2026).
